controls.pass_criteria: The repo exposes and classifies remote /mcp transport explicitly.
controls.remediation_template: Keep the remote /mcp surface explicit in code and validation scope.
controls.source_quote: Remote MCP servers need explicit transport inventory.
controls.title: Remote transport is inventoried

controls.pass_criteria: Machine-readable evidence proves authenticated ingress is enforced for remote /mcp.
controls.remediation_template: Add an attestation covering the deployed ingress auth layer for remote /mcp.
controls.source_quote: Remote access should be authenticated and policy-bound.
controls.title: Remote /mcp requires authenticated ingress policy

controls.pass_criteria: Remote MCP handlers reject malformed JSON-RPC envelopes and invalid params.
controls.remediation_template: Reject malformed JSON-RPC messages before reaching tool dispatch.
controls.source_quote: Validate protocol envelopes before execution.
controls.title: JSON-RPC messages are validated before dispatch

controls.pass_criteria: Session state is keyed per session and stale state is cleaned up deterministically.
controls.remediation_template: Keep session state isolated and expire stale session state deterministically.
controls.source_quote: Sessions should be isolated and cleaned up deterministically.
controls.title: Session isolation and cleanup exist

controls.pass_criteria: Evidence shows the deployed service enforces per-session quotas or equivalent controls.
controls.remediation_template: Add attested evidence for per-session quotas or implement them directly.
controls.source_quote: Resource limits should be scoped to sessions.
controls.title: Per-session quotas are evidenced

controls.pass_criteria: The tool risk inventory lists every registered tool with explicit risk fields.
controls.remediation_template: Synchronize the tool risk inventory with the registered tool set.
controls.source_quote: Every tool should have explicit risk metadata.
controls.title: Explicit tool risk inventory covers every tool

controls.pass_criteria: A signed manifest lockfile matches the current registered tool contracts.
controls.remediation_template: Regenerate and sign the tool manifest lockfile whenever tool contracts change.
controls.source_quote: Tool catalogs should be locked and integrity-protected.
controls.title: Signed tool manifest matches the registry

controls.pass_criteria: Machine-readable evidence exists for tool-change approval and review policy.
controls.remediation_template: Add an attestation for the tool approval workflow or wire the workflow into CI evidence.
controls.source_quote: Tool changes should follow explicit approval paths.
controls.title: Tool additions and changes have approval evidence

controls.pass_criteria: List surfaces stay compact and richer tool schemas are only exposed through describe flows.
controls.remediation_template: Keep list/describe surfaces separated and avoid over-broad schema disclosure.
controls.source_quote: Expose only the metadata needed for the current step.
controls.title: Tool metadata exposure is minimized

controls.pass_criteria: Every registered tool exposes input and output schemas.
controls.remediation_template: Add explicit input/output schemas for every tool contract.
controls.source_quote: Use schemas to define and constrain tool contracts.
controls.title: Tool contracts remain schema-bound

controls.pass_criteria: Redaction helpers and size-limit settings exist for tool outputs or artifacts.
controls.remediation_template: Add output redaction and hard byte or item limits before returning payloads.
controls.source_quote: Bound outputs and sanitize sensitive content.
controls.title: Outputs are redacted and size-bounded

controls.pass_criteria: HTTP and JSON-RPC tool invocation surfaces require structured JSON objects.
controls.remediation_template: Reject non-JSON or freeform execution paths for tool calls.
controls.source_quote: Avoid freeform execution channels for tools.
controls.title: Tool invocation stays structured JSON

controls.pass_criteria: High-risk tools are bound to HITL or equivalent approval evidence.
controls.remediation_template: Add HITL or equivalent approval evidence for any high-risk tool.
controls.source_quote: High-risk actions should require human approval.
controls.title: High-risk tools have HITL or equivalent approval

controls.pass_criteria: Evidence shows long-lived sessions are compartmentalized against prompt carry-over risk.
controls.remediation_template: Add deployment or runtime evidence for session/task compartmentalization.
controls.source_quote: Long-lived sessions need compartmentalized task boundaries.
controls.title: Long-lived sessions have compartmentalization evidence

controls.pass_criteria: Machine-readable evidence proves OAuth/OIDC or equivalent remote auth is deployed.
controls.remediation_template: Add an attestation for OAuth/OIDC or equivalent remote auth on /mcp.
controls.source_quote: Remote MCP should sit behind modern auth.
controls.title: OAuth 2.1/OIDC or equivalent protects remote /mcp

controls.pass_criteria: Checked transport code does not forward client bearer tokens to upstream services.
controls.remediation_template: Remove token passthrough and use server-held or brokered credentials instead.
controls.source_quote: Do not pass client tokens through server tool chains.
controls.title: Token passthrough is prohibited

controls.pass_criteria: Evidence shows tokens are short-lived, scoped, and bound to user or client identity.
controls.remediation_template: Add attestation evidence for token TTL, scopes, and subject binding.
controls.source_quote: Tokens should be short-lived, scoped, and bound.
controls.title: Short-lived scoped tokens are evidenced

controls.pass_criteria: Restricted data or sensitive actions are controlled by centralized policy enforcement.
controls.remediation_template: Add policy-engine evidence for restricted tools or mark them out of scope explicitly.
controls.source_quote: Sensitive actions should be mediated by centralized policy.
controls.title: Restricted data uses centralized policy enforcement

controls.pass_criteria: Evidence covers non-root execution, isolation, and network restriction posture.
controls.remediation_template: Add attestation evidence for hardened runtime and network segmentation controls.
controls.source_quote: Deploy hardened runtimes with network boundaries.
controls.title: Runtime hardening and network restrictions are evidenced

controls.pass_criteria: Evidence shows secret injection or equivalent controls prevent plain env-var-only exposure.
controls.remediation_template: Add attestation evidence for vault or secret-injection controls, or remove raw env-secret dependency.
controls.source_quote: Secrets handling should not rely on raw environment exposure alone.
controls.title: Secrets delivery is controlled beyond plain env vars

controls.pass_criteria: CI contains static analysis, dependency auditing, and secret scanning gates.
controls.remediation_template: Add or expand CI gates to cover SAST, SCA, and secret scanning.
controls.source_quote: Continuous validation should include secret and dependency scanning.
controls.title: CI includes security gates

controls.pass_criteria: The repo contains audit, integrity, and redaction support for sealed evidence packs.
controls.remediation_template: Add integrity and redaction support to audit artifacts.
controls.source_quote: Keep auditable evidence that can be verified and disclosed safely.
controls.title: Audit trails are immutable enough to verify and redact

controls.pass_criteria: Machine-readable evidence exists for peer review of security-sensitive changes.
controls.remediation_template: Add attestation evidence for branch protection or required review policy.
controls.source_quote: Security-sensitive changes should carry review evidence.
controls.title: Security-sensitive change review is evidenced

controls.pass_criteria: Attested evidence exists for monitoring, alerting, and log routing.
controls.remediation_template: Add attestation evidence for monitoring, SIEM ingestion, and alerting policy.
controls.source_quote: Continuous monitoring should back deployed controls.
controls.title: Monitoring and alerting evidence exists

controls.pass_criteria: CI runs the OWASP validator and uploads the generated report/backlog artifacts.
controls.remediation_template: Add a dedicated CI job for the OWASP validator with artifact publication.
controls.source_quote: Validation should be repeatable locally and in CI.
controls.title: OWASP validator runs in CI and publishes artifacts

controls.pass_criteria: CI includes OpenSSF Scorecard or an equivalent supply-chain posture check.
controls.remediation_template: Add OpenSSF Scorecard or an equivalent supply-chain posture check to CI.
controls.source_quote: Supply-chain posture should be validated continuously.
controls.title: Supply-chain posture checks exist

controls.pass_criteria: All minimum-bar controls pass in the strict profile.
controls.remediation_template: Close every failing minimum-bar control before claiming OWASP MCP baseline compliance.
controls.source_quote: The minimum bar is only met when the core controls hold together.
controls.title: OWASP MCP minimum bar checklist passes

source.title: A Practical Guide for Secure MCP Server Development
